styles.body: font-sans text-base leading-relaxed bg-gradient-to-br from-[#020617] via-[#0F172A] to-[#1E293B] text-[#E5E7EB]
styles.header: w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#020617] via-[#0F172A] to-[#020617] flex items-center justify-between border-b border-[#1E293B] backdrop-blur-md
styles.h1: text-5xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-[#38BDF8] via-[#818CF8] to-[#F472B6] bg-clip-text text-transparent mb-10 tracking-tight
styles.h2: text-4xl font-semibold bg-gradient-to-r from-[#22D3EE] to-[#A78BFA] bg-clip-text text-transparent mb-6 tracking-tight
styles.h6: text-lg font-medium text-[#818CF8] mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider
styles.button: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#22D3EE] via-[#38BDF8] to-[#818CF8] text-white rounded-xl hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 shadow-md
styles.checkbox: relative w-6 h-6 bg-[#1E293B] border-[#38BDF8] border-2 peer-checked:bg-gradient-to-r from-[#22D3EE] to-[#818CF8]
styles.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#334155] rounded-lg bg-[#020617]/80 text-[#F8FAFC] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#818CF8] focus:border-[#818CF8] backdrop-blur
styles.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#334155] rounded-lg bg-[#020617]/80 text-[#F8FAFC] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#818CF8] focus:border-[#818CF8] backdrop-blur
styles.select: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-md text-[#fff] bg-[#020617]
styles.label: text-sm font-medium mb-1 block text-[#C7D2FE]
styles.th: px-4 py-3 border border-[#1E293B] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#22D3EE] to-[#818CF8] text-white text-left
styles.blockquote: pl-6 border-l-4 border-[#818CF8] italic text-[#CBD5F5] my-6 bg-[#020617]/80 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur
styles.code: font-mono text-sm bg-[#020617] text-[#F472B6] px-2 py-1 rounded-md
styles.pre: font-mono text-sm bg-[#020617] text-[#F472B6] p-4 rounded-xl overflow-x-auto mb-6 border border-[#1E293B]
styles.aside: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#020617] to-[#0F172A] rounded-xl p-5 border border-[#1E293B] shadow-lg text-[#CBD5F5] mb-10
styles.footer: w-full text-center text-[#818CF8] py-6 border-t border-[#1E293B]
styles.mark: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#22D3EE] to-[#818CF8] text-[#020617] px-1 py-0.5 rounded
styles.details: mb-4 bg-[#020617]/80 border border-[#1E293B] rounded-xl p-4 backdrop-blur
styles.meter: block w-full h-2 bg-[#020617] rounded-md overflow-hidden
styles.progress: block w-full h-2 bg-[#1E293B] rounded-lg overflow-hidden
styles.dialog: bg-[#020617]/90 p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-lg mx-auto border border-[#1E293B] backdrop-blur
styles.datalist: block w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#334155] rounded-lg bg-[#020617]
styles.output: inline-block px-2 py-1 bg-[#020617] text-[#F8FAFC] rounded-md
styles.card: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#020617] to-[#0F172A] rounded-xl p-6 border border-[#1E293B] shadow-lg text-[#CBD5F5]
